{{Quote|The short guy is Usu Cley—he's from Rimsoo Five, about ninety kilometers toward the south pole from here. Cley was the Ninth Fleet Middle-Mass Champion two years running. I've seen him fight a couple of times—he's very good.|[[Jos Vondar]], to [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]]|<ref name="Battle Surgeons" />}}
'''Usu Cley''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] hand-to-hand combat instructor for [[Republic Mobile Surgical Unit 5|RMSU-5]] who served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] on [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]]. He was the [[Teräs Käsi/Legends|Teräs Käsi]] champion of the [[Ninth Fleet (Galactic Republic)|Ninth Fleet]] in his category for two consecutive years.<ref name="Battle Surgeons" />
